creator: chris@infosec.yi.org
text:
After upgrading and following all vendor supplied instructions, I am unable to print using my HP LaserJet 1022 printer. The printer was working fine using the previous version of HPLIP. The printer is USB and is connected as a UGEN device.

Printer has been switched on and off, and all daemons restarted in the correct order. 

The output from hp-setup follows:

Script started on Sat Nov 10 10:12:02 2007

[01mHP Linux Imaging and Printing System (ver. 2.7.9)[0m
[01mPrinter/Fax Setup Utility ver. 7.0[0m

under certain conditions. See COPYING file for more details.
